title: saxifraga moschata subsp. lamottei
intro: Saxifraga moschata subsp. lamottei, also known as the musky saxifrage, is a plant species belonging to the saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Saxifraga moschata subsp. lamottei include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote the healing of cuts and burns. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or tinctures made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
